thought.text: It seems there might be an issue with the API responses from these services. Let me try one more approach using a different weather service.

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "python3 -c \"import requests; print(requests.get('https://api.weather.com/v2/turbo/conditions/current?apiKey=your_api_key&language=en-US&format=json&locationKey=ILB017:1').json()['temperature'])\"", "is_input": "false", "security_risk": "MEDIUM", "summary": "Get current temperature in Burbank, IL using IBM Weather API"}

summary: Get current temperature in Burbank, IL using IBM Weather API
